ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_code" TEXT /* Ticker code of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "total_nsg" REAL /* Total NSG over the recorded years */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial performance */,
  "nsg_value" REAL /* NSG value for that year */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Annual net profit */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "capm_beta" REAL /* CAPM beta value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector for nested classifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment opportunity */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company under consideration */,
  "risk_adjusted_return" REAL /* Calculated risk-adjusted return for the company */,
  "investment_rating" TEXT /* Rating of investment opportunity (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "capm_value" REAL /* CAPM value */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Investment recommendation (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_opportunities_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data import occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the data import */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
